name: e2e-medallion-architecture
description: > Implement end-to-end Medallion Architecture (Bronze/Silver/Gold) lakehouse patterns in Microsoft Fabric using PySpark, Delta Lake, and Fabric Pipelines. Use when the user wants to: (1) design a Bronze/Silver/Gold data lakehouse, (2) set up multi-layer workspace with lakehouses for each tier, (3) build ingestion-to-analytics pipelines with data quality enforcement, (4) optimize Spark configurations per medallion layer, (5) orchestrate Bronze-to-Silver-to-Gold flows via notebooks. Triggers: "med
author: microsoft
